title: South Korea
dek: Eight days based in Seoul — palaces, markets, gaming districts and street food — with a weekend in Daejeon for MSI 2026. Everything below is checked; tick items off as you go and your progress saves.
footer: Location photos via Wikimedia Commons — tap any credit for its source, author and license.
intro: Seoul base, with a two-night trip to Daejeon for the MSI 2026 weekend (Jul 11–12). Seoul in July is hot and humid with monsoon rain — pack light layers and an umbrella.
verified: Checked 28 Jun 2026 for the 8–15 Jul trip; base, transit, Air Premia baggage, shopping & send-off dinner re-verified 7 Jul 2026; Airbnb address (19 Jong-ro), booking total ($2,007.90), and A Flower Blossom on the Rice reservation confirmed 8 Jul 2026 · Tokyo side-trip section (third traveler, Jul 11–13) added & checked 10 Jul 2026 · Mon Busan restructured (KTX 10:44/18:00; east cluster — T1 Base Camp Haeundae + Bonjeon gukbap) + HYBE HQ into Tue shopping + Daejeon post-MSI beef (Yakiniku Doryong / Gobang) + Jongno reunion KBBQ, checked 12 Jul 2026 · ⚠ re-verify same-day before going: T1 Base Camp + Bonjeon gukbap hours, Gobang/Yakiniku Doryong hours & Sunday opening, HYBE Weverse pop-up (may be none), KTX seats, Shibuya Sky/teamLab tickets & GO Fest roster
